title: Tangy Flaky Jamaican Sausage Bake
description: A midnight craving Jamaican-inspired dish featuring spicy sausage and tangy sauce, baked to a flaky, golden crust and perfect for a Whole30-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Jamaican seasoning blend (curry powder, allspice, thyme)

instructions: Slice sausage into ½-inch thick rounds and arrange in a 9x13-inch baking dish.
In a skillet over medium heat, melt coconut oil. Add onion and bell pepper; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and ginger; cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in Jamaican seasoning blend; cook 1 minute to toast spices.
Pour in tomato sauce, apple cider vinegar, and lime juice; stir to combine. Season with salt and pepper. Simmer 5 minutes.
Remove sauce from heat. Pour sauce evenly over sausage in baking dish.
Bake uncovered for 25–30 minutes, until sausage is cooked through and sauce is bubbly and golden.
Let the bake rest 5 minutes before serving. Garnish with chopped cilantro if desired (optional) and serve hot.
